description: Re-seat the three consumers and delete function_type_env (world.rs:1157). contract.rs:46, dispatch.rs:265 (param annotations), body.rs:477 (extern types) resolve names via the in-house resolver/TypeDefined instead of function_type_env. ResolvedSpecDecl and crate::specs are unchanged downstream (shared, over hard Ty). Externs: in-house extern type resolution replaces the env-based ir_lower::lower_extern_signature. Verify: spec_ok/spec_boundary/spec_violation fixtures and the contract/dispatch drive tests stay green.
title: Re-seat contract/dispatch/extern onto the resolver; delete function_type_env
